---
title: "Mobile App (Expo + React Native)"
subtitle: "iOS + Android with NativeWind and KaosMaps dark theme"
---

## Overview

The mobile app is built with **Expo SDK 55** and **React Native 0.83**, targeting both iOS and Android from a single codebase. It uses:

- **Expo Router v55** for file-based tab navigation
- **NativeWind v4** (Tailwind CSS for React Native) with KaosMaps dark theme
- **Zustand v5** for state management
- **TanStack Query v5** for API call caching
- **Lucide React Native** for icons (no emojis in UI)
- **expo-secure-store** for encrypted API key storage

## Screen Flow

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    G[Generate] --> R[Result]
    R --> G
    G --> S[Settings]
    GL[Gallery] --> R
```

Four tab screens:

| Tab | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Generate** | Prompt input, overlay text, resolution picker, generate button |
| **Result** | Image preview with share/save/favorite actions |
| **Gallery** | History list of generated memes |
| **Settings** | API key, default resolution/aspect ratio, about |

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Choice | Why |
|-------|--------|-----|
| Runtime | Expo SDK 55 | Managed workflow, EAS builds |
| Routing | Expo Router | File-based, type-safe |
| Styling | NativeWind v4 | Tailwind for RN, consistent with web |
| State | Zustand | Minimal boilerplate, persist middleware |
| API | TanStack Query | Caching, retry, stale-while-revalidate |
| Icons | Lucide RN | SVG-based, tree-shakeable |
| Security | expo-secure-store | Hardware-backed encryption |
| Tests | Jest + ts-jest | 49 unit tests passing |
